nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel ap Dafydd was born about 1270, in Brecon St David - Lower Division, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Dafydd ap Rhys, was 41 and his mother, Gwenllian verch Hywel Felyn, was 36. He had at least 1 son.

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Dafydd(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 브레콘 스트 데이비드-로어 디비시언에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dafydd ap Rhys(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Hywel Felyn(은)는 36세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.
